750.reason: [The node is being stored with curTokenIndex as key, but according to the problem description and Compiler.printResult(), nodes should be associated with line numbers (i+1 for token at index i). This causes syntax component names to be output at wrong positions or not at all.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [The node is being stored with curTokenIndex as key, but according to the problem description and Compiler.printResult(), nodes should be associated with line numbers (i+1 for token at index i). This causes syntax component names to be output at wrong positions or not at all.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [The node is being stored with curTokenIndex as key, but according to problem requirements, syntax component output should be associated with the line number of the first token in that component, not the current token index. This causes incorrect ordering in parser.txt output.]

1356.reason: [When a semicolon is missing, the error is recorded but the parser doesn't advance the token pointer, which can cause infinite loops or incorrect subsequent parsing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [When a semicolon is missing, the error is recorded but the parser doesn't advance the token pointer, which can cause infinite loops or incorrect subsequent parsing.]

807.reason: [Node should be added before consuming tokens for the component, not after; this causes incorrect ordering in output]

1353.reason: [When error occurs, parser doesn't advance token index, which may cause infinite loops or incorrect subsequent parsing]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [When error occurs, parser doesn't advance token index, which may cause infinite loops or incorrect subsequent parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [When error is detected, curToken is not advanced, which can cause infinite loops in parsing since the parser remains stuck on the same token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [When missing semicolon, the error line should correspond to the last token of the statement, but curTokenIndex-1 might not be correct if parsing has advanced beyond the actual last token of the construct]

1360.reason: [Same issue: missing token consumption on error leads to potential infinite loop or incorrect state]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [When error is detected, curToken is not advanced, which can cause infinite loops in parsing since the parser remains stuck on the same token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Similar issue: curTokenIndex-1 may not point to the correct token that should precede the missing right parenthesis]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Same problem: the line number calculation for missing ']' is likely incorrect because curTokenIndex-1 doesn't necessarily represent the last token before the expected ']']

825.reason: [Node should be added before consuming tokens for its components, not after. According to spec, non-terminals should be output before analyzing their children, but this adds it at the end after all children are processed.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Node should be added before consuming tokens for its components, not after. According to spec, non-terminals should be output before analyzing their children, but this adds it at the end after all children are processed.]
